full_text:
Zhao Song (Bogao)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Song, styledBogao, was born in Hanzhong. Sought to avenge the death of Su Gu. Attacked Zhang Xiu’s camp by himself and killed a dozen men before dying. Zhao Song was affiliated with Su Gu. Zhao Song lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
